title: fritillaria meleagris subsp. delphinensis
intro: Fritillaria meleagris subsp. delphinensis is a subspecies of the snake's head fritillaria, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Fritillaria meleagris subsp. delphinensis include reducing cough and mucus production, as well as alleviating symptoms of allergies and sinusitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to relieve respiratory congestion and promote overall well-being.
